title: Garlic Gherkin Bliss Stew
description: A hearty stew made with sautéed garlic, gherkin, and bliss, perfect for a cold day. This stew is a great way to warm up and nourish your body.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced gherkin and sauté for another 2 minutes.
Add the chopped bliss and stir well.
Pour in 2 cups of vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the bliss is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
